---
title: "miQC"
output: html_document
---
Set paths
```{r}
rds_path <- "/projectnb/ds596/projects/Team 9/scQC_project/colon_immune_raw.rds"
out_path  <- "/projectnb/ds596/projects/Team 9/scQC_project/recreation/miQC/miQC_filtered.rds"
umap_path <- "/projectnb/ds596/projects/Team 9/scQC_project/recreation/miQC/umap.png"
```

Load packages
```{r include=FALSE}
library(Seurat)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(scater)
library(miQC)
```

Load the shared Seurat object
```{r}
seurat_obj <- readRDS(rds_path)
```

Convert to SingleCellExperiment
```{r}
sce <- as.SingleCellExperiment(seurat_obj)
```

Define mitochondrial gene subset and compute QC metrics
```{r}
mt_genes      <- grepl("^MT-", rownames(sce))
feature_ctrls <- list(mito = rownames(sce)[mt_genes])

sce <- addPerCellQC(sce, subsets = feature_ctrls)
```

Visualize metrics before filtering
```{r}
plotMetrics(sce)
```

Fit mixture model
```{r}
model <- mixtureModel(sce)
plotModel(sce, model)
plotFiltering(sce, model)
```

Filter cells
```{r}
sce_filtered <- filterCells(sce, model)

message(sprintf("Cells before filtering: %d", ncol(sce)))
message(sprintf("Cells after filtering:  %d", ncol(sce_filtered)))
```

Convert back to Seurat
```{r}
seurat_filtered <- as.Seurat(sce_filtered, counts = "counts", data = NULL)
```

Create the UMAP
```{r}
# Normalize and reduce dimensions for UMAP visualization
seurat_filtered <- NormalizeData(seurat_filtered)
seurat_filtered <- FindVariableFeatures(seurat_filtered)
seurat_filtered <- ScaleData(seurat_filtered)
seurat_filtered <- RunPCA(seurat_filtered)
seurat_filtered <- RunUMAP(seurat_filtered, dims = 1:30)

umap_plot <- DimPlot(seurat_filtered, reduction = "umap")
umap_plot
ggsave(umap_path, umap_plot, width = 6, height = 5)
```

Save filtered object
```{r}
saveRDS(seurat_filtered, file = out_path)
```
